site.title: Chayn Reports
site.description: Interactive reports from Chayn, a global charity supporting survivors of gender-based violence and abuse.

cookieBanner.heading: We use analytics cookies
cookieBanner.body: to understand how visitors engage with our reports and to improve Chayn’s content. No personal data is stored or shared with third parties.
cookieBanner.updateBody: We use analytics to understand how people engage with our resources and improve our support for survivors. No personal data is stored or shared.
